title: cyperus articulatus var. nodosus
intro: Cyperus articulatus var. nodosus, also known as nodding flatsedge, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyperus articulatus var. nodosus include its use in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential in lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to make poultices and salves for topical application.
